name_cn:
💰Niki Sheepskin_22cm
The spring/summer Niki metal chain is replaced with a heavier golden tone, adding elegance and luxury to the bag. It is not overly trendy but showcases personality—a truly magical piece! Uses exclusive ZP original factory leather paired with highest-grade solid copper hardware—the authentic scent is unmistakable.
Model: 533037
Size: 22x16.5x7.5cm
